info.title: Coupa API
info.description: RESTful API that provides robust access to read, edit, or integrate your data with the Coupa platform. The [JSON](/api_docs/20.json) and [YAML](/api_docs/20.yaml) are also available.  To test with OAuth2 OAuth2AccessCode, make sure to include https://r39.coupadev.com/oauth2-redirect.html in the client's Redirect URI list

scopes.core.pay.payments.read: Allows Coupa Pay payments to be read
scopes.core.pay.payments.write: Allows Coupa Pay payments to be modified

scopes.core.pay.payments.read: Allows Coupa Pay payments to be read
scopes.core.pay.payments.write: Allows Coupa Pay payments to be modified

active.description: A false value will inactivate the account making it no longer available to users.  A true value will make it active and available to users.

code.description: All segments concatenated with a hyphen ( - )

created-at.description: Automatically created by Coupa in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MMZ

name.description: This is the nickname for the account.  Users can view and search against this field through the user interface.

segment-1.description: Each segment represents the segment of the account code (e.g. code: 99-9023-100132, where segment-1 is 99, segment-2 is 9023, and segment-3 is 100132)

created-at.description: Automatically created by Coupa in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS+HH:MMZ

exported?.description: Flag indicating whether the transaction has been exported to an external system

last-exported-at.description: Date of last update to the allocation

payable-from-amount.description: Amount allocated in currency of the document sending the allocation

payable-from-id.description: Coupa ID of the payable document sending the allocation

payable-from-type.description: Type of payable document sending the allocation

payable-to-amount.description: Amount allocated in currency of the document receiving the allocation

payable-to-id.description: Coupa ID of the payable document receiving the allocation

payable-to-type.description: Type of payable document receiving the allocation

reason-code.description: Code indicating the trigger for this allocation

source.description: Originating system (ERP, Coupa Pay, UI, etc)

source-transaction-from-id.description: Coupa ID of the source transaction on the sending side

source-transaction-from-reference.description: Reference number of the source transaction on the sending side

source-transaction-from-type.description: Type of the source transaction on the sending side

source-transaction-to-id.description: Coupa ID of the source transaction on the receiving side

source-transaction-to-reference.description: Reference number of the source transaction on the receiving side

source-transaction-to-type.description: Type of the source transaction on the receiving side

discount-cutoff-day.description: Document before this day are eligible for discount else they will fall into the next month

discount-due-day.description: This field is used to calculate the document's discount due date.

discount-due-month.description: This field is used to calculate the document's discount due date along with the discount due day.

net-cutoff-day.description: This helps to determine payment due date if the document should be counted against this month or next

net-due-day.description: This helps to determine the document's payment due date

net-due-month.description: This helps to determine the document's payment due date

type.description: Type can be either DaysAfterNetPaymentTerm or SpecificDayPaymentTerm
